features.name: robot_left_of_target_center
features.source:
def f1(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    return robot_x < target_cx

features.name: robot_right_of_target_center
features.source:
def f2(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    return robot_x > target_cx

features.name: robot_below_target_center
features.source:
def f3(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    return robot_y < target_cy

features.name: robot_above_target_center
features.source:
def f4(s, a):

features.name: robot_inside_target_rect
features.source:
def f5(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    return (robot_x >= target_x) and (robot_x <= target_x + target_width) and (robot_y >= target_y) and (robot_y <= target_y + target_height)

features.name: manhattan_to_target_lt_0.2
features.source:
def f6(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    dist = abs(robot_x - target_cx) + abs(robot_y - target_cy)
    return dist < 0.2

features.name: manhattan_to_target_lt_0.5

features.name: manhattan_to_target_lt_2.0

def f9(s, a):

features.name: action_moves_toward_target_x
features.source:
def f10(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    delta = target_cx - robot_x
    return (a[0] * delta) > 0

def f11(s, a):

    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    delta = target_cy - robot_y
    return (a[1] * delta) > 0

def f12(s, a):

    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    dx = target_cx - robot_x
    dy = target_cy - robot_y
    return (a[0] * dx > 0) and (a[1] * dy > 0)

features.name: robot_aligned_x_with_target_center
features.source:
def f16(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    return abs(robot_x - target_cx) <= robot_base_radius

def f18(s, a):

    target_x = s[9]

    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]

    delta = target_cx - robot_x
    return (abs(delta) > 0.1) and (a[0] * delta > 0)

features.name: robot_in_target_and_action_small
features.source:
def f36(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    in_target = (robot_x >= target_x) and (robot_x <= target_x + target_width) and (robot_y >= target_y) and (robot_y <= target_y + target_height)
    action_small = (abs(a[0]) < 0.01) and (abs(a[1]) < 0.01)
    return in_target and action_small

features.name: robot_not_in_target_and_action_large
features.source:
def f37(s, a):

    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    in_target = (robot_x >= target_x) and (robot_x <= target_x + target_width) and (robot_y >= target_y) and (robot_y <= target_y + target_height)
    action_large = (abs(a[0]) > 0.02) or (abs(a[1]) > 0.02)
    return (not in_target) and action_large

features.name: robot_closer_x_than_y_to_target
features.source:
def f38(s, a):

def f39(s, a):

features.name: action_zero
features.source:
def f41(s, a):
    return (abs(a[0]) < 1e-4) and (abs(a[1]) < 1e-4) and (abs(a[2]) < 1e-4) and (abs(a[3]) < 1e-4) and (abs(a[4]) < 1e-4)

features.source:
def f44(s, a):
    return (abs(a[0]) > 0.01) and (abs(a[1]) > 0.01)

features.name: action_in_direction_of_greatest_target_gap
features.source:
def f53(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    dx = target_cx - robot_x
    dy = target_cy - robot_y
    if abs(dx) > abs(dy):
        return a[0] * dx > 0
    else:
        return a[1] * dy > 0

features.name: action_in_direction_of_smallest_target_gap
features.source:
def f54(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    dx = target_cx - robot_x
    dy = target_cy - robot_y
    if abs(dx) < abs(dy):
        return a[0] * dx > 0
    else:
        return a[1] * dy > 0

def f66(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    at_center = (abs(robot_x - target_cx) <= robot_base_radius) and (abs(robot_y - target_cy) <= robot_base_radius)
    only_y = (abs(a[1]) > 0.01) and (abs(a[0]) < 0.005) and (abs(a[2]) < 0.005) and (abs(a[3]) < 0.005) and (abs(a[4]) < 0.005)
    return at_center and only_y

def f72(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2
    at_center = (abs(robot_x - target_cx) <= robot_base_radius) and (abs(robot_y - target_cy) <= robot_base_radius)
    rot_or_vac = ((abs(a[2]) > 0.01) or (abs(a[4]) > 0.01)) and (abs(a[0]) < 0.005) and (abs(a[1]) < 0.005) and (abs(a[3]) < 0.005)
    return at_center and rot_or_vac
